parameters.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    COUNT(*) AS orders_90d,
    SUM(total_amount)::numeric/100.0 AS gmv_eur_90d,
    MAX(created_at) AS last_order,
    EXTRACT(day FROM NOW() - MAX(created_at))::int AS silent_days,
    AVG(EXTRACT(epoch FROM created_at - lag_t)/86400.0)::numeric(8,2) AS avg_interval_days,
    AVG(total_amount)::numeric/100.0 AS avg_aov_eur
  FROM (
    SELECT user_id, created_at, total_amount,
           LAG(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at) AS lag_t
    FROM public.orders
    WHERE status IN ('completed','paid','fulfilled','delivered')
      AND user_id IS NOT NULL
      AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
  ) t
  GROUP BY user_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 AND SUM(total_amount) >= 30000  -- ≥3 orders, ≥€300 in 90d
),
top_brands AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (o.user_id)
    o.user_id,
    p.brand AS fav_brand
  FROM public.orders o
  JOIN public.order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
  JOIN public.products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
  WHERE o.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
  ORDER BY o.user_id, o.created_at DESC
)
SELECT json_agg(t) AS result FROM (
  SELECT
    b.user_id::text,
    b.orders_90d,
    b.gmv_eur_90d,
    b.last_order::date::text AS last_order,
    b.silent_days,
    b.avg_interval_days,
    b.avg_aov_eur,
    tb.fav_brand,
    -- anomaly flags
    (b.silent_days > GREATEST(b.avg_interval_days * 1.5, 7)) AS is_silent_anomaly,
    b.silent_days > 14 AS is_critical_silent
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN top_brands tb ON tb.user_id = b.user_id
  ORDER BY b.gmv_eur_90d DESC
  LIMIT 20
) t;
